course_title: THE SUPREME COURT AS A POLITICAL INSTITUTION
description: This course uses a social science approach to analyze theories of judicial decision making and to learn how law is made in a political context. Students will understand how the Supreme Court and justices operate in an interdependent political environment.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and (POLI SCI 104,184, orLEGAL ST/​POLI SCI  217)
